one_time_description: Proceeds from sale of land related to CFB lands claim settlement, internally restricted for tangible capital asset replacement reserve
economic_notes: Nation holds interests in forestry, property management, and environmental monitoring enterprises through GBEs. Purchased 3 lots on reserve land during the year. COVID-19 impact noted as uncertain.
notes: 8 entities accounted for under modified equity method as GBEs (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Ltd., Centre Creek LP, Centre Creek Management Ltd., Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd., Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd., Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP). Major recurring one-time item: land sale proceeds from 2015 CFB lands claim settlement ($2,840,414 in 2020, $6,670,121 in 2019). No schedule of remuneration provided. Current liabilities not separately disclosed on face of statements. Long-term debt of $817,659 with additional $244,486 received subsequent to year end. TTM and TTLP changed year ends from March to December during the year.
